user.description: Fill in the location to track and your OpenSky Network API credentials.

init.description: Edit parameters for the location to track.

area_stale.title: Nearby Flights area data may be temporarily blocked
area_stale.description: The Nearby Flights integration for **{name}** has been showing cached area/zone data for more than {minutes} minutes. This usually means OpenSky's servers are temporarily rate-limiting the area feed, or the request is failing outright. Sensors that depend on aircraft currently in the area may be stale until this clears. No action is needed - this should resolve on its own once the feed recovers, and this issue will disappear automatically when fresh data is received again.
